name_en: Top-tier replica M13243 Black. This M size Twist Slim handbag is presented in Epi grained calfskin with a distinctive texture, incorporating the iconic LV Twist lock and dazzling metal hardware. The Toron handle is embellished with the colorful Monogram pattern from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series. 16 x 8 x 23 cm (H x W x D)
